down_to_earth.title: Proper Initial Positioning
down_to_earth.principle: Place the red ball at a strategic distance from the green ball to ensure sufficient initial momentum.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When placing the red ball to initiate the collision.

down_to_earth.title: Dynamic Radius Adjustment
down_to_earth.principle: Adjust the radius of the red ball to control the collision impulse and ensure the green ball is pushed off the platform.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When simulating the collision to fine-tune the force applied.

down_to_earth.title: Platform Edge Geometry Consideration
down_to_earth.principle: Place the red ball at the edge of the platform to maximize the force applied to the green ball.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When positioning the red ball to ensure maximum impact.

down_to_earth.title: Gap Width Analysis
down_to_earth.principle: Ensure the red ball can push the green ball through the gap by analyzing the gap width.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: Before placing the red ball to check if the green ball can pass through.

down_to_earth.title: Simulate Partial Actions
down_to_earth.principle: Simulate partial actions to observe intermediate states and make adjustments before the final collision.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: During the planning phase to test different placements and radii.

down_to_earth.title: Red Ball Placement Near Edge
down_to_earth.principle: Place the red ball near the edge of the platform to maximize the force applied to the green ball.
down_to_earth.when_to_apply: When the red ball needs to be placed close to the edge of the platform.

down_to_earth.description: Agent repeatedly tries to place the red ball near the green ball.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: Lack of understanding of the required distance for initial momentum.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Apply the 'Proper Initial Positioning' skill to ensure the red ball is placed at a strategic distance.

down_to_earth.description: Agent fails to properly simulate the action after finding a valid placement.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: Insufficient testing of the placement and radius before finalizing.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Use the 'Simulate Partial Actions' skill to test the placement and radius.

down_to_earth.description: Agent does not consider the gap width and platform edge geometry.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: Lack of awareness of the necessary conditions for the green ball to pass through the gap.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Apply the 'Gap Width Analysis' and 'Platform Edge Geometry Consideration' skills.

down_to_earth.description: Agent places the red ball with an excessive radius, causing it to exceed environmental boundaries.
down_to_earth.why_it_happens: Overestimating the required radius to apply sufficient force.
down_to_earth.how_to_avoid: Apply the 'Dynamic Radius Adjustment' skill to ensure the radius is appropriate.
